title: antennaria beringensis
intro: Antennaria beringensis, also known as Bering's everlasting or Bering's cottony everlasting, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to western Alaska and northwestern Canada. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antennaria beringensis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners. Antennaria beringensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions.
